fields.label: Anonymous Id
fields.description: An Anonymous Identifier. The Anonymous Id string is used as identifier when sending data to Insider. Anonymous Id is required if the UUID field is empty.

segment_anonymous_id.title: Anonymous Id
segment_anonymous_id.description: An Anonymous Identifier. The Anonymous Id string is used as identifier when sending data to Insider. Anonymous Id is required if the UUID field is empty.

fields.label: Custom Identifiers
fields.description: You can select your custom identifiers for the event.

custom_identifiers.title: Custom Identifiers
custom_identifiers.description: You can select your custom identifiers for the event.

fields.label: Timestamp
fields.description: When the event occurred

fields.label: User Properties
fields.description: User Properties defines all the details about a user.

attributes.title: User Properties
attributes.description: User Properties defines all the details about a user.

phone.title: Phone Number
phone.description: User's phone number in E.164 format (e.g. +6598765432), can be used as an identifier.

idfa.title: IDFA
idfa.description: IDFA used for Google and Facebook remarketing

fields.label: Enable Batching?
fields.description: When enabled, Segment will send events in batches.
